authority: Prototype Municipal Zone Waste Management Department

guidelines.instructions: Rinse containers to remove organic residue. Flatten boxes to conserve bin space. Keep separate from wet organic waste.
This bin is for dry flexible packaging that standard sorters cannot recycle. The municipality sends these to cement plants for energy recovery. Keep dry.
Place in sealed bags. Hand over at the ward-level hazardous waste collection point. Do not mix with normal trash.
guidelines.collection_schedule: First Sunday of every month (9:00 AM - 12:00 PM)

guidelines.instructions: Take to participating community health centers or pharmacy disposal boxes. Do not place in dry or wet bins.
